metadata.desc: Monitors chat images and uses VLM to auto-classify and store them. Intelligently matches and sends stickers based on conversation mood. Supports LLM proactive sticker search, WebUI management, storage cleanup, scope repair, smart emotion matching, and multi-platform compatibility.

steal_mode.hint:
probability=Probability mode: random chance on each received image
cooldown=Cooldown mode: enforce a minimum interval between collections

steal_chance.hint: Probability of attempting to collect each received image. 0.0=never, 1.0=always. Recommended: 0.2–0.5

image_processing_cooldown.description: Steal cooldown in seconds (in cooldown mode)
image_processing_cooldown.hint: Minimum interval between two collections in seconds. 0=no limit.

content_filtration.hint: Uses VLM to review image content. May increase processing time.

content_filtration_fail_open.description: Allow import on audit service errors
content_filtration_fail_open.hint: Policy hint for audit-service failures only. Images explicitly rejected by moderation will still not be imported.

enable_natural_emotion_analysis.hint:
On: LLM mode (lightweight model analyzes semantics, doesn't modify LLM replies)
Off: Passive tag mode (LLM inserts emotion tags, modifies reply content)

Use /reset to clear context after switching modes.

emotion_analysis_provider_id.hint: Leave blank to use current session model. A lightweight free model is recommended.

vision_provider_id.hint: Leave blank to auto-use AstrBot's global default_image_caption_provider_id.

send_target_whitelist.hint: Format: group:group_id or user:user_id. When non-empty, only whitelisted targets can receive stickers.

send_target_blacklist.hint: Format: group:group_id or user:user_id. Can be combined with whitelist; priority controls conflict resolution.

send_target_filter_mode.hint: whitelist_first=whitelist takes priority, blacklist_first=blacklist takes priority.

steal_target_whitelist.hint: Format: group:group_id or user:user_id. When non-empty, only whitelisted targets allow collection.

steal_target_blacklist.hint: Format: group:group_id or user:user_id. Can be combined with whitelist; priority controls conflict resolution.

steal_target_filter_mode.hint: whitelist_first=whitelist takes priority, blacklist_first=blacklist takes priority.

max_reg_num.hint: Storage limit. Old images are removed when the limit is exceeded.

storage_cleanup_strategy.hint: conservative=clean stale index rows and temp files only, balanced=also clean orphan files and thumbnail cache, aggressive=also clean raw files.

napcat_token.hint: Only needed in special network setups: Docker AstrBot + local NapCat where auto token detection fails. Leave blank to auto-detect from OneBot adapter config.

steal_meme.hint: Monitors and saves images from chat. Requires visual model support.

auto_send_meme.hint: Bot will automatically send stickers during conversation. Test first.

meme_chance.hint: Probability of auto-sending a sticker. 0.0=never, 1.0=always. Recommended: 0.1–0.3

send_meme_as_gif.hint:
On: send as GIF (closer to native sticker style)
Off: send in original format (png/jpg/gif etc.)

High-frequency GIF sending of large images may cause high memory usage.

meme_send_delay.hint:
Delay before sending emoji to avoid conflicts with message-segmentation plugins.
Recommended: ≥ 5.0 s. Set to 0 to send immediately.

meme_send_delay_random.hint:
On: random delay between [delay] ~ [max delay] for more natural timing
Off: use fixed delay

meme_send_delay_max.hint: Only applies when random delay is enabled. Actual delay = random between [delay] ~ [max].

auto_meme_intent_gate.hint: Skips commands, serious/error replies, very short replies, and question-heavy messages where auto-sending is inappropriate.

auto_meme_cancel_on_new_message.description: Cancel pending auto-send on new message
auto_meme_cancel_on_new_message.hint: Cancels the previous delayed auto-send when a new message arrives in the same session.

smart_meme_selection.hint:
On: composite scoring (diversity + relevance + similarity)
Off: random selection (still avoids short-term repeats)

custom_meme_classification_prompt.hint: Edit directly. {emotion_list} will be replaced with the category list. Delete all and save, then reload plugin to restore defaults.

custom_meme_classification_with_filter_p.hint: Used when content filtering is enabled. Delete all and save, then reload plugin to restore defaults.

steal_pool_capacity.hint: Auto-stolen images enter the pool first; stealing pauses when full. Adjustable in real-time

enable_embedding_search.hint: FaissVecDB semantic similarity matching; auto-degrades to BM25 when unavailable

embedding_provider_id.hint: Leave blank to auto-use AstrBot first Embedding Provider. Check Admin LLM Config for available IDs
